name: Treaty-Based Return Position Disclosure

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who are residents of a country with which the U.S. has an income tax treaty and who have income that would otherwise be subject to higher U.S. tax rates.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can claim benefits from a U.S. tax treaty that overrule or modify internal revenue laws, potentially reducing or eliminating U.S. tax on specific income types.
